chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.388 of 2022 Saima Naz and others Versus Hoor Jehan and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing case (priority) 1. For orders on office objection a/w reply at “A”. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.3830/2022 (Stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 15.04.2024 M/s. Asim Iqbal and Farmanullah Khan, Advocates for appellants. Mr. Mirza Moiz Baig, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Rehan Kayani, Advocate for Respondents No.1 to 3..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Mr. Asim Iqbal, learned counsel for appellants after arguing the matter at some length agreed that this appeal may be disposed off with directions that the issue of maintainability of the suit along with any other legal issue be heard and decided along with pending injunction application or applications. Order accordingly. With this understanding the appeal stands disposed off along with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
